comment: Re-creates EB scene data_20.l_0xc65ea3 near world pixel 1512,1744 (card-clique punks guarding the road to Frank). A punk (npcId 142) steps up to hassle Bosch, his buddy (npcId 143) closes ranks, then they fold and slink off. Original [1F F1 ...] movement = punk shuffling toward the player as a follower; set(flag 363) preserved as eventFlag 363.

pages: A kid in a backwards cap plants himself in your lane. His deck of cards fans like he practiced it in a mirror.
His buddy drifts in behind you. The math is two-on-one and they want you to do it.
You don't blink. You've got nowhere soft to be.
The cap kid reads it on your face and the bravado leaks out of him like air from a slow tire.
"...Forget it. You're not worth the cards. Go see Frank if you're so tough."
